requirement.title: REQ-1332
requirement.requirement: In particular, the requirements made of the test documentation in SPEC 10305-1 Draft 1: E / E Environmental Testing; Part 1: Test Specifications>, Chapter 5.4 and the requirements made on the test setups in SPEC 10305-1 Draft 1: E / E Environmental Testing; Part 1: Test Specifications>, Chapter 5.5 must be taken into consideration.
